issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if your Leader has {Revolutionary Army} type, not if a card is on board.
Action should be 'ForceDiscard' not 'TrashFromHand'. The effect trashes from deck (top), not from hand. Use ForceDiscard with source 'Deck' and position 'Top'.
Missing source specification. Should specify trashing from 'Deck' not 'Hand'.
